category_sources: Official CSpell documentation describes it as a command-line tool and library for spell checking code.
source_facts.description identifies CSpell as a spell checker for code.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the CSpell display name.
docs_sources: Official CSpell website provides a dedicated documentation section.
repo_sources: Official CSpell documentation and GitHub project identify streetsidesoftware/cspell as the source repository.
source_facts.homepage points to the official CSpell site.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CSpell docs describe spell checking for code from the command line.
